global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a clear focus on food delivery services.
global.main_message: The ad promotes a food delivery service with a special offer.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'CraveLoop' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text reads 'Hungry? We got you' in a large, friendly font, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Delivery information
elements.description: The text 'Free delivery over $15' is displayed in a smaller font, positioned below the main message.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Claim reward' in a contrasting color, centered at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge in the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, eye-catching text.

elements.label: Decorative icons
elements.description: Two simple outline icons are displayed above the main text, suggesting food items.

elements.label: Additional decorative element
elements.description: Another decorative element that complements the overall design, possibly an icon or graphic.

elements.label: Background area
elements.description: The lower part of the ad contains a larger area that supports the main message and CTA.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Fre ~ lk Claim reward

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: The logo appears prominently at the top, reinforcing brand identity.

elements.label: Sale indicator
elements.description: A small, bright badge indicating a sale, positioned at the top right corner.
